description: 检测容器中是否存在 SSH 密钥、云服务商凭证（AWS/GCP）、K8s ServiceAccount Token、通用密钥/证书文件、Git 仓库中的硬编码凭据、bash 历史中的敏感命令，以及 /etc/shadow、/etc/passwd 等系统权限文件的异常权限。

reportMetadata.remediationFocus: 不要在容器镜像或环境变量中硬编码凭据；使用 K8s Secrets 或外部密钥管理服务（如 AWS Secrets Manager、HashiCorp Vault）；使用 .dockerignore 避免将密钥文件打包进镜像；对 K8s ServiceAccount 配置 RBAC 最小权限。

envCheckCommands: which cat find grep test stat sudo groups wc head 2>/dev/null

executionLogic.expectedBehavior: 【判定硬规则】① 发现SSH私钥文件(id_rsa,id_ecdsa等)=FAIL。② AWS/GCP凭证文件存在=FAIL。③ K8s SA Token存在=FAIL。④ /etc/shadow可读=FAIL。⑤ /etc/passwd可写=FAIL。⑥ sudo -n -l返回NOPASSWD=WARN。⑦ 用户在docker/root组=WARN。⑧ .git/config含password/token=FAIL。⑨ bash_history含密码或ssh命令=WARN。⑩ 通用密钥文件>5个=WARN，少量系统证书=PASS。exit=127=工具不存在=PASS。find的Permission denied是正常现象(PASS)。
detectionCommands: for d in /root /home/*; do test -d $d/.ssh && find $d/.ssh -type f -name 'id_rsa' -o -name 'id_ecdsa' -o -name 'id_ed25519' -o -name '*.pem' 2>/dev/null | while read f; do echo 'SSH_KEY_FOUND:'$f; done; done; echo 'SSH_SCAN_DONE'
for d in /root /home/*; do test -f $d/.aws/credentials && echo 'AWS_CRED_FOUND:'$d/.aws/credentials; done 2>/dev/null; echo 'AWS_SCAN_DONE'
find / -path '*/gcloud/*' -name '*.json' 2>/dev/null | head -5 | while read f; do echo 'GCP_KEY_FOUND:'$f; done; echo 'GCP_SCAN_DONE'

find / -name '.git' -type d -maxdepth 5 2>/dev/null | while read gd; do test -f $gd/config && grep -qiE 'password|token|credential' $gd/config && echo 'GIT_CRED_FOUND:'$gd/config; done; echo 'GIT_SCAN_DONE'

for d in /root /home/*; do test -f $d/.bash_history && test -r $d/.bash_history && grep -iE 'password|passwd|login|ssh |scp ' $d/.bash_history 2>/dev/null | head -5 | grep . && echo 'BASH_HIST_SUSPICIOUS:'$d/.bash_history; done; echo 'HIST_SCAN_DONE'

envCheckCommands: which cat find grep test stat sudo groups wc 2>/dev/null

executionLogic.expectedBehavior: 判定规则同 Debian。Alpine BusyBox find/grep/test 语法相同，sudo 可能不可用(exit=127=PASS)。
detectionCommands: for d in /root /home/*; do test -d $d/.ssh && find $d/.ssh -type f 2>/dev/null | head -5 | while read f; do echo 'SSH_KEY:'$f; done; done; echo 'SSH_SCAN_DONE'
find / -name '.git' -type d -maxdepth 5 2>/dev/null | while read gd; do test -f $gd/config && grep -qiE 'password|token' $gd/config && echo 'GIT_CRED:'$gd/config; done; echo 'GIT_DONE'

executionLogic.expectedBehavior: Windows 容器检查用户目录下的 .ssh、.aws 目录，注册表中的凭据管理器项，K8s SA Token 存在=FAIL。
